caption:
Finally, after a really long break, Netbees is back! Thanks everyone who participate for today’s game. 
.
Friendly match with MMU staff. 
📍MMU Indoor Court
Here's your amazing committees and members club! You guys da best! 🙆🏻

Hi, first of all, thank you for supporting and for being interested to join our event.
.

On behalf of our management, I am deeply sorry for the sudden changes. There are a few internal problems that we could not avoid, thus changes have been made.
.

We have decided to postpone the date of the tournament along with new terms. We are terribly sorry for all the inconvenience caused. .

We do hope you can still support our event even after all the changes made. Thank you.

Greetings. How's everyone? 🎉🤪
-
We are glad to announce an exciting news. MMU Netbees and MMU Ebees Rugby will be having *Annual General Meeting Netbees X Ebees 🏀🏉* 🥳 Are you excited as we are? Also, we will be introducing to you our new High Committee Members Line-Up for 2019/2020 from both clubs! ✨
-
Mark your calendar!
Date: 1st August 2019 (Thursday)
Time: 8.30 - 10.00pm
Venue: MPH CNMX 1002
-
Everyone is invited and the most important is, ZERO entrance fee will be charged! Plus scrumptious food and drinks are provided, so do come with your empty stomach. And ya, together with your friends! 😋
-
Hoping to see you there 😘

Feeling bored during this MCO?

Good news for you girls!

Come and join us !
 We invite you to come and meet the coaches, players , ask any questions and many more !
 Youre welcome to join ❤️❤️

🎉
Therefore, here's the end of our Open Nettball Tournament of 2018! Thanks to all participants and our loyal committees for your hardwork and endless efforts. We also wanna thanks to our sponsorship, MMU Convofest of 2018 and lastly our beloved universities for this opportunity and chances for our club to handle this event. It's an honour. Once again, thank you to all that involved in this event and we'll see you next time, adios!
.
.

.
.

caption: It was nice to see all students getting involved in mmu club and society. Also thanks to all the netball members that help us during this week for new recruitment. See you guys soon in our training and future meeting! Have a nice day ahead 😘♥️

🏀 MMU CONVOFEST OPEN WOMEN NETBALL TOURNAMENT 🏀
.
.
.
.
 The MMU Netbees, the Netball Club of Multimedia University Cyberjaya will be organising an open women netball tournament this month! 
The details of the event are as below : 📆 When : 22 September, 2018 (Saturday)
🥅 Where : Indoor Court, MMU Cyberjaya
💰 Fees : RM100 per team
.
.
.
For registration or further inquiries, feel free to contact us through WhatsApp
📞 Aiman 018-9124090
📞 Ainul 010-4494870
.
.
.
Also, for more updates on any upcoming events by the MMU Netbees, do follow our instagram account :
😛 @mmunetbees
.
.
.

Do join us and participate! We can't wait to see you guys participate! Also, you wouldn’t want to miss the prize aite? 😜🏅🏆💸
.
.
.
.
